title: 日本ダービーの後に・リフレクト

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and Winning Ticket suffer defeat
at the Japanese Derby, but Winning Ticket
refuses to lose heart despite the crushing loss.
Her unwavering resolve frightens Biwa Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While on the track, visions of a loss-filled future
flood Biwa Hayahide's mind, and she can't shake
them off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She starts to wonder if the reason Narita Taishin
and Winning Ticket keep disrupting her equation
is because of their iron will to improve, something
which she lacks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Panic fills her at the thought, and she asks me to
increase her training intensity so she won't lose at
the Kikuka Sho.
